user: les tickets du projet comant2026 créés par mwu
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'comant2026' AND u.username = 'mwu' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: cherche les tickets créés par mwu, assignés à sls
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user creator ON creator.id = t.creator_id JOIN user assignee ON assignee.id = t.assignee_id WHERE creator.username = 'mwu' AND assignee.username = 'sls' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: cherche les tickets assignés à sls du projet Comant2026
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE u.username = 'sls' AND p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets associés au produit 3D_Evolution
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_product tp ON tp.ticket_id = t.id JOIN product p ON p.id = tp.product_id WHERE p.name LIKE '%3D_Evolution%' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets en attente d'une compilation de sls
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'sls' AND t.validation_status = 'En attente d\'une compilation' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets ouverts de sls
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'sls' AND t.status = 'Ouvert' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets assignés à mwu qui ont un temps effectif supérieur ou égal à 5h
correct_sql: SELECT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN planning p ON p.ticket_id = t.id JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'mwu' AND t.type != 'Group' GROUP BY t.id, t.code, t.summary HAVING SUM(p.duration) / 3600 >= 5

user: les tickets créés par sls qui ont un temps estimé supérieur à 5h
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id WHERE u.username = 'sls' AND t.time_estimate > 5 AND t.type != 'Group'

user: cherche les tickets du projet MultiView
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'MultiView' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: donne-moi les tickets qui sont associés à deux ou plus projets
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id WHERE t.type != 'Group' GROUP BY t.id, t.code, t.summary HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pt.project_id) >= 2

user: les tickets associés au client PTC
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_client tc ON tc.ticket_id = t.id JOIN client cl ON cl.id = tc.client_id WHERE cl.name LIKE '%PTC%' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: cherche les tickets qui n'ont pas de correction souhaitée
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.close_status = 'Pas de correction souhaitée' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: cherche les 10 derniers tickets qui ont été ajoutés au projet Comant2026 par l'utilisateur qui a créé un ticket pour le projet test-sls en mai 2025
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id WHERE p.code = 'Comant2026' AND u.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.creator_id FROM ticket t2 JOIN project_ticket pt2 ON pt2.ticket_id = t2.id JOIN project p2 ON p2.id = pt2.project_id WHERE p2.code = 'test-sls' AND t2.create_time >= '2025-05-01' AND t2.create_time < '2025-06-01') AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 10

user: tickets associés à la branch dev tools
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'tools' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets de projets qui ont la branche de release Rios49
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_release = 'Rios49' AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets associés à la branche de travail main
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE FIND_IN_SET('main', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 AND t.type != 'Group'

user: les tickets associés à la branche DComant
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE t.type != 'Group' AND (FIND_IN_SET('DComant', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 OR p.branch_release = 'DComant' OR p.branch_dev = 'DComant')

user: le dernier ticket que j'ai consulté hier
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND DATE(l.datetime) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 1

user: les 5 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 5

user: les tickets du premier projet que j'ai consulté aujourd'hui
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.id = (SELECT l.ressource_id FROM log l WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-PROJECT' AND DATE(l.datetime) = CURDATE() ORDER BY l.datetime ASC LIMIT 1) AND t.type != 'Group'

user: le dernier ticket qui a été fermé par sls
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id JOIN user u ON u.id = l.user_id WHERE u.username = 'sls' AND l.action = 'UPDATE' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé' AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 1

user: cherches les tickets qui ont été fermés en mars 2026 en lien au projet SLS2025
correct_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE p.code = 'SLS2025' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND l.action = 'UPDATE' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé' AND l.datetime >= '2026-03-01' AND l.datetime < '2026-04-01' AND t.type != 'Group'
